benefitsAchieved: Segment colors now centralized in CSS variables (globals.css)
Single source of truth for segment identity colors
Easy to adjust segment colors without code changes
Maintainable mapping structure for future segments

changes.description: Replaced hardcoded segment spotlight colors with CSS variable references (var(--segment-*)); added SEGMENT_SPOTLIGHTS config map and getSegmentKey helper for cleaner segment-to-color mapping

result.failureAnalysis: Pre-existing backgroundPosition test failure unrelated to segment identity changes

segmentMappings.survivor: var(--segment-survivor) - amber, top spotlight with alpha boost
